mapper.update:
/* productCnslMapper.updateProductCounselCustInfo */
UPDATE NMCP_PRODUCT_COUNSEL@DL_MCP SET COUNSEL_NM = LPAD('*', LENGTH(COUNSEL_NM), '*') , COUNSEL_CTN = LPAD('*', LENGTH(COUNSEL_CTN), '*') , COUNSEL_ADDR = LPAD('*', LENGTH(COUNSEL_ADDR), '*') , COUNSEL_ADDR_DTL = LPAD('*', LENGTH(COUNSEL_ADDR_DTL), '*') , COUNSEL_EMAIL = LPAD('*', LENGTH(COUNSEL_EMAIL), '*') WHERE ( COUNSEL_STATUS IN ('C', 'D') OR (COUNSEL_STATUS = 'S' AND DONE_DT < SYSDATE)) AND INSTR(COUNSEL_CTN, '*') = 0
